title: Fix: 근처 파스타 맛있는 곳 찾아줘, 주차 가능한 데로
goal: Command '근처 파스타 맛있는 곳 찾아줘, 주차 가능한 데로' failed with: Finding nearby locations requires user's current location which was not obtained, and 'browser' is a generic tool rather than a maps/local search tool, making the result unreliable.. Suggestion: Request user's location first, then use a maps or local search tool (e.g., maps_search) to find nearby pasta restaurants with parking.

test_requirements.case: route and execute '근처 파스타 맛있는 곳 찾아줘, 주차 가능한 데로...'

test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
